name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) addressing HIPAA obligations and the permitted use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI).

fields.label: BAA Effective Date
fields.help: The date this Business Associate Agreement takes effect.

fields.label: Underlying Agreement
fields.help: The name or reference to the underlying service agreement between Provider and Company that this BAA supplements (e.g. 'Cloud Service Agreement dated January 1, 2025').

fields.label: Breach Notification Period
fields.help: The period within which Provider must report a breach or unauthorized use/disclosure of PHI to Company (e.g. '30 days', '72 hours').

fields.label: Limitations
fields.help: Any restrictions on Provider's rights under the Data Rights & Restrictions section, such as prohibitions on offshoring PHI, de-identification, or aggregation. Leave blank if no limitations apply.
